commit.message:
fix(auth): 429 rate limit backoff + admin_settings RLS simplification

1. Supabase client now uses custom fetch with automatic retry + exponential
   backoff for 429 responses. Prevents the auth death spiral where rate-limited
   token refresh fires SIGNED_OUT → clears session → retry → 429 again.

2. Simplified admin_settings RLS from has_role() dependency to simple
   user_id = auth.uid(). The has_role() check created a circular dependency
   with user_roles RLS, causing 42501 on INSERT for super_admin users.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

eng: fix admin_settings RLS INSERT policy (42501)

Split single FOR ALL policy into separate SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE
policies. The combined policy was causing 42501 insufficient_privilege
on INSERT for super_admin users. Migration deployed via API.

- Remove console.log debug statements from AuthContext (auto-create, tenant switch)
- Downgrade console.warn to comments for expected session retry scenario
- Silence AdminModeContext console.error for expected RLS/permission failures
- Replace console.error in fire-and-forget trigger-workflow/busy_blocks catches
  with silent catch handlers (main operation already succeeded)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Bump dependencies and update vibe commands

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix job mode: stop hallucinations, add speech reliability, back off when challenged

Frame analysis: completely rewrote prompt to be conservative — default is "OK",
only flag things that are OBVIOUS and CERTAIN. Sonnet was hallucinating with the
old aggressive "SPEAK UP" prompt (inventing water leaks on floors).

Voice prompts: added "back off when challenged" rules so AI says "my bad" instead
of doubling down. Made job mode more conversational — can chat about anything.

operationLock: added 30s watchdog timeout so if API hangs, the lock auto-releases
and speech isn't permanently dropped. Replaced raw lock manipulation with
acquireLock()/releaseLock() methods.

Error surfacing: voice response errors now show "Sorry, I didn't catch that"
instead of being silently swallowed.

commit.message:
Fix AdaDion: cast to float32 for eigh/eigvalsh (bf16 not supported on CUDA)

FSDP2 shards parameters in bf16 on H200s, but torch.linalg.eigh does not
support bf16. Cast Gram matrix to float32 for eigendecomposition, then
cast result back to original dtype.

Add lives remaining to defeat panel and improve replay controls layout

Defeat panel now shows "X lives remaining" or "No lives remaining" text.
Reorganized ReplayControls: speed buttons moved to top row beside centered
"Replay" label, transport buttons centered on second row, more compact sizing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Caairn position: use CSS right/bottom, snapshot on drag

The old approach calculated left/top once on mount using
window.innerWidth/innerHeight. If the browser zoom level differed
from when the position was calculated, the window appeared offset
from bottom-right.

New approach:
- Default position uses CSS right:32px bottom:32px (always correct
  regardless of zoom/resize)
- On first drag/resize, getBoundingClientRect() snapshots the actual
  rendered position and switches to left/top for dragging
- Eliminates any calculation mismatch between CSS and JS positioning

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix Welivery auth: use Basic auth instead of custom headers

The Welivery API requires HTTP Basic auth (key:secret), not X-Api-Key/
X-Api-Secret headers. Wrong auth caused API to return {status:401} which
was silently treated as "no comprobante" — leaving all comprobante fields NULL.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(pendragon-coding-5nu): scope global h3 rule to .content to resolve specificity conflict

Replace bare `h3, h4, h5, h6` selector in styles.css with `.content h3, ...` so
the global prose style only applies inside content zones. Card-level h3 headings
(BlogCard, BlogPostLayout, ContentCard) now use text-green-100 deterministically
without !important overrides. Eliminates compilation-order non-determinism.

fix(users): use INSERT OR IGNORE to prevent TOCTOU race in GetOrCreate

Concurrent requests could both pass the SELECT check then race to INSERT,
causing a UNIQUE constraint failure. INSERT OR IGNORE + final SELECT is atomic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: prevent 'No message found' crash after session rewind/revert

Two issues caused the crash:
1. In editAndRestart fallback, sessionId was cleared AFTER restartClaude(),
   so launchClaude still tried to resume the old (invalid) session.
   Now sessionId is cleared BEFORE restart.
2. The fallback error detection didn't recognize "No message found" errors,
   only "No conversation found". Added the missing pattern so these errors
   also trigger an automatic fresh session start.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

feat(content-gaps): botão "Criar Pauta" por gap — enfileira geração de abordagens via IA

Cada card de content gap ganha botão "Criar Pauta" que chama
POST /pauta-inbox/generate com source_type='content_gap'.
Estado visual: loading → "Pauta criada" (verde) após sucesso.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(frontend): fix Vercel rewrite to proxy API requests with trailing slashes

The previous rewrite pattern /api/v1/:path* did not match paths ending
with a trailing slash, causing /api/v1/itineraries/ to fall through to
the SPA fallback and return index.html instead of proxying to the API.
Changed to /api/:match* and excluded /api/ from the SPA catch-all.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: operator takeover + habilita cadeia de avaliação GLM

Operator takeover:
- Parse Evolution Payload detecta fromMe=true → isOperatorTakeover=true
- Novo nó "É Mensagem do Operador?" desvia o fluxo antes do reset check
- Novo nó "Supabase - Pausa Conversa" seta paused=true no banco
- Supabase - Busca Conversa retorna campo paused
- Merge - Contexto da Conversa propaga paused
- Verifica Bloqueios checa paused com prioridade máxima
- Novo nó "É Pausa do Operador?" roteia paused vs opted_out/confirm_optout
- Migration 004: colunas paused + paused_at em gk_conversations

Cadeia GLM reativada:
- Conversa Encerrada? habilitada e conectada à saída de Processa Resposta FastAPI
- Supabase - Histórico Completo habilitado
- Conversa Encerrada? TRUE → Supabase - Histórico Completo (bypassa nó de reação desativado)
- Toda a cadeia GLM → auto-tune permanece intacta e ativa

commit.message:
feat: neumorphic dark redesign + improved profile panel

Visual overhaul:
- New neumorphic design system: neuo-raised, neuo-flat, neuo-inset, neuo-btn
  CSS utility classes with dual-tone shadows (dark bottom-right, light top-left)
- Color palette: #181828 root, #1e1e30 panels, #222238 modals/elevated
- Removed all backdrop-blur from non-overlay elements (solid neuo depth instead)
- Borders reduced from white/[0.06] to white/[0.04] throughout

Typography & icons:
- text-[13px] → text-sm, text-[11px] → text-xs across UI
- Hash/channel icons: size 14 → 16
- Nav + action icon buttons: w-8 → w-9
- Send button: w-8 → w-9 + neuo-btn + indigo shadow
- Message usernames: font-bold text-[15px]

Component upgrades:
- Active channel: neuo-inset + indigo left border accent
- Active voice ch: neuo-inset + emerald left border accent
- Active DM: neuo-inset + indigo left border accent
- Category headers: more breathing room (pt-5 pb-1.5)
- Message hover: card lift effect (hover:-translate-y-px + neuo-flat)
- User bar: neuo-raised card, avatar w-9 rounded-xl
- Message input: neuo-inset container + focus ring + indigo glow
- Activity feed: neuo-flat items, neuo-raised on hover
- Auth: feature cards neuo-raised, tab switcher neuo-inset
- Empty state icons: float-up animation + neuo-raised

Toast redesign:
- Slide-in from right (x:40 spring stiffness:380 damping:28)
- Solid dark bg per type (#0d2218 success, #220d0d error, #221800 warn)
- Icon wrapped in colored w-8 h-8 rounded-xl badge
- Positioned top-right instead of top-center

Profile panel redesign:
- Banner gradient: deterministic from user ID hash (getBannerGradient)
- Avatar: w-20 h-20 rounded-2xl neuo-raised, overlapping banner
- Name: text-xl font-black + mono tag #XXXX
- Custom status: pill badge with emoji extraction (neuo-flat rounded-full)
- Badges row: 🌐 Cordis, 🛡️ role, 📅 member since
- Bio: neuo-inset recessed block
- Info rows: joined date + mutual friends with icon badges
- Action buttons: gradient DM button + Phone + Video (neuo-btn)
- Own profile: improved form with neuo-inset fields + gradient save btn

Spring physics:
- Profile modal: stiffness:340 damping:28
- Status picker: stiffness:400 damping:30
- Channel stagger: stiffness:320 damping:28
- Call widget: stiffness:340 damping:28
- Toasts: stiffness:380 damping:28

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Astria client and kie_client reliability improvements

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Align depth display to color camera FOV to eliminate zoom mismatch

The D435 depth sensor (86x57 deg) has a wider FOV than the color sensor
(69x42 deg). When toggling to depth view, the 848x480 depth was upscaled
to 1920x1080 but showed a different angular extent, causing a visible
zoom shift. Now uses rs.align(rs.stream.color) to produce a display_depth
frame at 1920x1080 in the color camera's perspective, so both views share
the same FOV. The existing depth-aligned pipeline for point clouds is
unchanged.

Also removes Execute, Stop, Home, Export PLY, and Preview PLY buttons
from the Automatic Controls section, and uses os._exit in the daemon
script to avoid librealsense segfault on shutdown.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: checkpoint feedback textarea for controlled pipeline

Add optional comment input to checkpoint panel. Comments are sent
with confirm/reject actions and persisted as stage_feedback.

commit.message:
Add README with project overview, install, and experiment instructions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Reset to default settings when toggling back to design mode

Calling init() when leaving validate mode ensures the library,
symbols, and all settings are restored to a clean working state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: installer hardening + Setup Wizard overhaul

Installer — three show-stopping bugs fixed (found on Ubuntu 24.04 VM):
- Bug 1: Run composer install before artisan commands — bind-mount shadows
  image vendor/ on fresh clone
- Bug 2: Recreate php container after key:generate (docker compose up -d,
  not restart) so env_file reloads APP_KEY before db:seed
- Bug 3: chown/chmod storage + bootstrap/cache for www-data after seeding
- Add wait_healthy() utility (polls container every 3s up to 90s)
- Add non-blocking preflight check for backend/vendor/ absence
- Write frontend/.env.local with installer credentials so login page's
  "Fill demo credentials" button uses actual admin email/password
- Set must_change_password=true for installer-created admin via psql

Setup Wizard — complete overhaul:
- SetupWizardContext so any admin page can open wizard without prop-drilling
- Admin Dashboard card (Wand2, superadmin-only) triggers wizard from context
- Dynamic step list: Change Password step injected when must_change_password=true
  (superadmins bypass ChangePasswordModal — wizard handles it in step 2)
- New ChangePasswordStep with 5-bar strength meter + installer creds callout
- WelcomeStep: removed cosmetic org name input; two-column layout with
  "What we'll configure" icon cards and "Before you start" checklist
- SystemHealthStep: AI service down/degraded → inline "Configure AI →" shortcut
- DataSourcesStep: EunomiaCallout banner when Eunomia source is present;
  Eunomia visually separated from other sources
- CompleteStep: two-column layout — setup summary with per-item "Fix →"
  go-back buttons + "What to do next" quick-start links
- Slide animation (direction-aware CSS keyframes)
- X button hidden until password changed on must_change_password installs
- Step indicator: pl-8 pr-14 to prevent X button overlapping step 6 circle
- Font sizes bumped one level throughout (text-xs→text-sm, text-sm→text-base)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix teacher can't remove child: delete orphaned child on unlink

When a teacher adds a child before the parent signs up, parentId is set
to the teacher's ID. Unlinking only removed the teacherChildren record,
but the child still appeared via getChildrenByParent since parentId was
the teacher. Now also deletes the child + memories when the teacher is
the temporary parent (no real parent has claimed the child).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Tighter DealCard padding on mobile (p-3.5 → p-3)
- Shorter runner-up CTA buttons (py-2 → py-1.5)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Use own AJAX endpoint for taxonomy search instead of ACF's

ACF's acf/fields/taxonomy/query endpoint requires ACF-specific nonce
verification that fails on the frontend. Instead, register our own
memdir_search_taxonomy_terms handler that:

- Uses standard WordPress nonce (memdir_search_terms)
- Accepts taxonomy slug + search string
- Calls get_terms() directly with search parameter
- Shuffles results for variety
- Returns { results: [{id, text}] } format

PHP: Added handle_search_taxonomy_terms() to AcfFormHelper
PHP: Added search_nonce to mdAjax localized script data
JS: Reads taxonomy slug from ACF's data-taxonomy attribute
JS: Sends to memdir_search_taxonomy_terms with proper nonce

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
